title: Evening property chat
transcript_text:
James Wright: Thanks for the tour this afternoon on Maple Close.

Mr Raj Patel: Yes, 22 Maple Close Wimbledon. SW19 4AB.

James Wright: Three bedrooms, good potential. When were you thinking of selling?

Mr Raj Patel: Possibly spring next year. We want to find somewhere larger first.

Mr Raj Patel: Budget wise we're hoping for mid-fives — perhaps £550,000.

James Wright: I'll send over some SW19 4AB comparables and we can revisit in a few months.
summary_text: 22 Maple Close SW19 4AB. Spring sale timeline, ~£550k hope. Recorded by James Wright.
